grant_title: Fidelis Care Food Security Grant Program
project_area: food security programs and Food Is Medicine (FIM) practices
demographic_requirements: Programs must support food security and integrate access to nutritious food into healthcare delivery to prevent, manage, or treat diet-related diseases.
eligibility_summary: Applicants must serve New York State and align with goals of improving health outcomes, reducing healthcare costs, and addressing disparities in nutrition and chronic disease management.
